docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ROBIN CHEUNG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER STEVE LIU. MR. LIU WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. DEFENDANT JOSE ESCOBAR IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARACISA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, ROBIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JOSE $5,913.95 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,988.95, DEFENDANT WAS ILLEGALLY PARKED ON GRANT AVENUE, A ONE WAY STREET GOING NORTH. DEFENDANT WAS PARKED ILLEGALLY ON RIGHT SIDE OF STREET. DEFENDANT'S PASSENGER OPENED REAR DOOR ON DRIVER'S SIDE OF VEHICLE DAMAGING PLAINTIFF'S CAR IN AMOUNT OF $3855.95 CAUSING MEDICAL DAMAGE OF $2058 BY CHIROPRACTOR'S BILL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,113.00 FILED BY CHEUNG, ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
